use_cases: Revealing text content with animated horizontal line sweep on scroll for hero sections
Creating engaging section headers with smooth spring-physics animations
Adding scroll-triggered visual interest to landing page content blocks
Enhancing feature callouts with animated text reveal effects
Building animated marketing pages with interactive text highlight effects
ai_summary: A scroll-triggered text reveal effect component that animates a horizontal line across text using Framer Motion's spring physics. The component features crosshair accent elements positioned at corners with customizable colors, creating a sophisticated split-text animation ideal for hero sections and landing pages. Smooth physics-based motion with configurable fill timing and accent colors.
